_logger.LogInformation("PGP TRACE: after GNUServices.DecryptAsync. Output length: {Length}", outputms.Length);

if (outputms.Length == 0)
{
    var exception = new InvalidOperationException(
        $"DIA decrypted output is empty. File: {payload.FileName}");

    _logger.LogError(
        exception,
        "Invalid DIA decrypted file format detected after decryption. FileName: {FileName}",
        payload.FileName);

    await _diaExceptionNotificationService.NotifyFailureAsync(
        payload.FileName,
        "InvalidDecryptedFileFormat",
        exception,
        cancellationToken);

    return;
}

string filename = $"{DateTime.Now:Mdy_HHmm}_{Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N")[..5]}.txt";
